targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, portfolio_yield_pct AS YieldPct, portfolio_yield_on_cost_pct AS YoCPct FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, portfolio_yield_pct AS YieldPct, portfolio_yield_on_cost_pct AS YoCPct FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, dividends_realized_mtd AS MTD, dividends_realized_30d AS D30, dividends_realized_qtd AS QTD, dividends_realized_ytd AS YTD FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, dividends_realized_mtd AS MTD, dividends_realized_30d AS D30, dividends_realized_qtd AS QTD, dividends_realized_ytd AS YTD FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local

targets.queryText: WITH latest_day AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_dividends_upcoming), latest_period AS (SELECT period_type, period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), u AS (SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, ex_date_est AS ExDate, COALESCE(pay_date_est,'') AS PayDate, round(amount_est,2) AS Amount, 'upcoming' AS Src FROM daily_dividends_upcoming WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM latest_day) ORDER BY ex_date_est LIMIT 3), p AS (SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, ex_date AS ExDate, COALESCE(pay_date,'') AS PayDate, round(amount,2) AS Amount, 'period' AS Src FROM period_dividend_events WHERE (period_type,period_start_date,period_end_date) IN (SELECT period_type,period_start_date,period_end_date FROM latest_period) ORDER BY ex_date DESC LIMIT 2) SELECT Sym, ExDate, PayDate, Amount, Src FROM (SELECT * FROM u UNION ALL SELECT * FROM p) ORDER BY ExDate LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest_day AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_dividends_upcoming), latest_period AS (SELECT period_type, period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), u AS (SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, ex_date_est AS ExDate, COALESCE(pay_date_est,'') AS PayDate, round(amount_est,2) AS Amount, 'upcoming' AS Src FROM daily_dividends_upcoming WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM latest_day) ORDER BY ex_date_est LIMIT 3), p AS (SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, ex_date AS ExDate, COALESCE(pay_date,'') AS PayDate, round(amount,2) AS Amount, 'period' AS Src FROM period_dividend_events WHERE (period_type,period_start_date,period_end_date) IN (SELECT period_type,period_start_date,period_end_date FROM latest_period) ORDER BY ex_date DESC LIMIT 2) SELECT Sym, ExDate, PayDate, Amount, Src FROM (SELECT * FROM u UNION ALL SELECT * FROM p) ORDER BY ExDate LIMIT 5
